items.summary:
Today only, as part of its daily deals offer, Woot is offering Lenovo’s IdeaPad Pro 5 16-inch OLED Copilot PC for $949.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). This is originally a $1,520 notebook that has more recently been going for around $1,450 at Amazon, so you’re looking at a solid 34% markdown right now. It’s currently listed at $1,299 at Amazon, but today’s deal at Woot knocks a significant chunk off the price to bring it within $19 of the all-time low we tracked just earlier this month when it briefly hit the $930 mark. That makes this one of the best prices we’ve seen for the machine, and it offers a great value today with its OLED panel, RTX 50-series GPU, and well-rounded performance package.

items.title: Amazon is offering the Segway E3 Pro e-scooter down at $530 right now + other models starting from $140
items.summary:
While Segway has extended its Spring Sale EV lineup through to April 5th, we’ve spotted some of its popular e-scooters dropping lower in price over at Amazon, like the E3 Pro Electric Scooter at $529.99 shipped, for example, which beats its direct website pricing by $70. This newer model is listed with a $700 MSRP direct from Segway, however, you can more often find it down at $600 over at Amazon, with the Big Spring Sale pricing being retained here for added savings. While we have seen it go as low as $500 in the past, that rate hasn’t been seen since Black Friday, with the $70 markdown from its going rate (and $170 off the MSRP) being the next-best price to score it at. Head below for more on it and the other models seeing greater Amazon deals.

more…

items.title: The reputation of troubled YC startup Delve has gotten even worse

items.title: Get your outdoor spring cleaning tackled with Greenworks’ Gen 2 Pro 2,300 PSI electric pressure washer at $320
items.summary:
Amazon has dropped the price on the Greenworks Pro Gen 2 Brushless 2,300 PSI Electric Pressure Washer to $319.99 shipped, beating out its direct website price, where it is still listed at its full $400 rate. It’s mostly been keeping between $350 and $400 in 2026, but right after Amazon’s Big Spring Sale ended, the price was cut down for folks looking for some last-minute outdoor spring cleaning solutions. While we have seen the price go a bit lower in the past, you’re still looking at a solid 20% markdown here that saves you $80 off the tag.

more…

items.title: LEGO reveals three new Toy Story sets for pre-order ahead of the fifth franchise movie release

Fans won’t have to wait very long to get their hands on these new sets, with all three also able to secure right now with pre-orders. items.title: A new dating app, Sonder, has a deliberately annoying sign-up process (and it’s working)

items.title: A lifetime subscription to this new PDF editor is on sale for $80 (Reg. $140)
items.summary:
Why should anyone have to pay a monthly subscription for something as simple as a PDF editor? Instead of dropping a recurring fee just to use one of the most common file formats in the world, switch to something like PDF Expert that lets you do it for a flat fee. Right now, a lifetime subscription to PDF Expert is on sale for $79.99, but it won’t stay that way (reg. $139.99).
